zh.lifeSummary: 當Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette於大約1171年出生時，他的父親Ludwig I. Grafvon Pfirt bzw. Ferrette11169歲，母親Richenza Gräfin von Habsburg28歲。他於大約1200年與Heilwig von Urach結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1233年2月8日在法國阿爾薩斯享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette于大约1171年出生时，他的父亲Ludwig I. Grafvon Pfirt bzw. Ferrette11169岁，母亲Richenza Gräfin von Habsburg28岁。他于大约1200年与Heilwig von Urach结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1233年2月8日在法国阿爾薩斯享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Comte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jean Jacques.
French:

nickname for someone in the service of a count or for someone who behaved pretentiously, from Old French conte, cunte ‘count’. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the French cognate Lecomte . Compare Conte 3.

variants.name: Lecomte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Monique, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Dominique, Francois, Germain, Gilles, Gregoire, Huguette, Pierre.

French and Walloon: nickname for someone in the service of a count or for someone who behaved pretentiously, from Old French conte, cunte ‘count’, with fused masculine definite article le. Compare Comte 1.
History: This surname is listed (in the form Le Comte) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrette
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alcee, Anite, Emile, Emilien, Jean-Louis, Rosaire.
Variant of   Verrett  , a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Verrett
meanings: Altered form of French Verret , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Frédéric
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From German. See Friedrich and Frederick .

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette was born about 1171, his father, Ludwig I. Grafvon Pfirt bzw. Ferrette, was 11169 and his mother, Richenza Gräfin von Habsburg, was 28. He married Heilwig von Urach about 1200. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 February 1233, in Alsace, France, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette est né environ 1171, son père, Ludwig I. Grafvon Pfirt bzw. Ferrette, avait 11169 ans et sa mère, Richenza Gräfin von Habsburg, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Heilwig von Urach environ 1200. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 février 1233, à Alsace, France, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette um 1171 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ludwig I. Grafvon Pfirt bzw. Ferrette 11169 und seine Mutter Richenza Gräfin von Habsburg 28. Er hat um 1200 Heilwig von Urach geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Februar 1233 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Elsaß, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette è nato il circa 1171, il suo padre, Ludwig I. Grafvon Pfirt bzw. Ferrette, aveva 11169 anni e il suo madre, Richenza Gräfin von Habsburg, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Heilwig von Urach circa 1200. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 febbraio 1233, nel Alsace, Francia, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Frédéric II. Comte de Ferretteが約1171年に生まれた時，父Ludwig I. Grafvon Pfirt bzw. Ferretteは11169歳，母Richenza Gräfin von Habsburgは28歳であった。約1200年にHeilwig von Urachと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1233年2月8日にフランスアルサスで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette(이)가 대략 1171년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ludwig I. Grafvon Pfirt bzw. Ferrette(은)는 11169세였고, 그의 어머니 Richenza Gräfin von Habsburg(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1200년 Heilwig von Urach(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1233년 2월 8일 프랑스 알사스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette nasceu aproximadamente 1171, seu pai, Ludwig I. Grafvon Pfirt bzw. Ferrette, tinha 11169 anos e sua mãe, Richenza Gräfin von Habsburg, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Heilwig von Urach aproximadamente 1200. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1233, em Alsace, França, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette родился около 1171 г., его отцу по имени Ludwig I. Grafvon Pfirt bzw. Ferrette было 11169 лет, а матери, которую звали Richenza Gräfin von Habsburg, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Heilwig von Urach около 1200 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 февраля 1233 г. в местности алсеис, Франция в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Frédéric II. Comte de Ferrette nació aproximadamente 1171, su papá, Ludwig I. Grafvon Pfirt bzw. Ferrette, tenía 11169 años y su mamá, Richenza Gräfin von Habsburg, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Heilwig von Urach aproximadamente 1200. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de febrero de 1233, en Alsace, Francia, a la edad de 63 años.
